geographic_restrictions: Syracuse, NY (with potential statewide or national resources)
project_area: Veteran support services including housing assistance, job training, mental health support, career counseling, community integration, and advocacy
demographic_requirements: Open to all veterans and their families, with a focus on those transitioning to civilian life or facing challenges such as housing insecurity, unemployment, mental health issues, or financial hardship.
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants include veterans of any branch of the U.S. military, their spouses, dependents, and family members. Organizations providing veteran support services may also be eligible for partnerships or funding opportunities. Priority is given to those in Syracuse, NY, but services may extend statewide or nationally.
